title: Orlovi rano lete
writer: Branko Copic, Soja Jovanovic, Nenad Jovicic
actors: Pavle Jovanovic, Pavle Polacek, Ljubomir Popovic
plot: A group of kids from the Bosnian village often run away from school from the terror of Pepper, a teacher who got his nickname because of his red nose. Soon they formed a brigand division, but have been discovered and caught. The s...
